title: p-adic Hodge Theory Attack — Period Rings as Descent Engines

analysis.object: T764: p-adic Hodge Theory Attack — Period Rings as Descent Engines depth analysis

fontaine_b_dr.description: B_dR: de Rham period ring -- complete discrete valuation field

fontaine_b_cris.description: B_cris: crystalline period ring -- Frobenius action

fontaine_b_st.description: B_st: semistable period ring -- monodromy operator N

comparison_theorem.description: p-adic comparison: H^*(X_K, Q_p) tensor B_dR = H^*_dR(X) tensor B_dR

descent_via_comparison.description: p-adic Hodge gives descent from p-adic cohomology to de Rham -- de Rham to algebraic is the remaining step

scholze_connection.description: Scholze perfectoid: generalizes p-adic Hodge theory to relative setting

t764_result.description: T764: p-adic Hodge theory = bridge B_cris connects crystalline (EML-3) to de Rham (EML-2). Does not directly close descent but maps the depth structure precisely.
t764_result.reason: p-adic Hodge is a depth functor from EML-3 to EML-2 -- useful

analysis.theorem: T764: p-adic Hodge Theory Attack — Period Rings as Descent Engines (S1043).

key_theorem: T764: p-adic Hodge Theory Attack — Period Rings as Descent Engines (S1043).
